user.title: Configure Home Battery Sizer
user.description: Sensors will be auto-detected from your Energy dashboard if configured. Otherwise, choose cumulative energy sensors in kWh.

data.solar_sensor: Solar production sensor (total cumulative energy, kWh) - auto-detected from Energy dashboard
data.grid_import_sensor: Grid import sensor (total cumulative energy imported from grid, kWh) - auto-detected from Energy dashboard
data.grid_export_sensor: Grid export sensor (total cumulative energy exported to grid, kWh) - auto-detected from Energy dashboard
